title: Central Vac Hose Reel and Attachment Organizer
summary: A wall-mounted shelf cabinet sized to hold a central vac hose reel and its attachments in one place instead of scattered around a utility closet.
description:
This is a simple 1x8 shelf tower with a plywood mounting panel at the back, built specifically to carry the weight of a central vac hose reel — most reels mount straight to a solid panel rather than to individual shelf boards, which is why the center of this build is a single piece of 3/4" plywood rather than another shelf.

Mount it into wall studs, not just drywall anchors; a loaded hose reel plus attachments is real weight hanging off one wall panel, and the plan is explicit about using screws long enough to reach the studs behind whatever your wall covering is.

materials.name: Wood screws, sized to reach wall studs
materials.note: Length depends on your wall covering — this carries real weight, mount to studs.

steps.title: Build the outer frame
steps.body: Build the outer frame from the two sides and top/bottom shelves using pocket holes (3/4" setting, 1-1/4" pocket screws) — 1-1/4" brad nails and glue or wood screws (self-tapping, 1-3/4" to 2-1/4") work as well if you don't have a jig.

steps.title: Add the shelves and center panel
steps.body: Add the remaining shelves, preferably with screws for the extra holding strength a mounted hose reel needs. Nail and glue the center plywood mounting panel into place.

steps.title: Attach the back and mount to the wall
steps.body: Attach the optional back panel with 5/8" to 3/4" brad nails. Hang the organizer on the wall through the 3/4" center panel, using screws long enough for your wall type and driven into studs — not just drywall anchors, given the weight of a loaded hose reel.
materials: Wood screws, sized to reach wall studs

steps.title: Sand, finish, and mount hardware
steps.body: Lightly sand with 120-grit sandpaper, clean off the residue, and apply a wood stain with a lint-free rag. Mount your hose hanger and attachment hardware to the 3/4" center panel per its manufacturer's instructions.

images.alt: Wall-mounted shelf organizer holding a central vac hose reel
